titleStmt.title: SII 17.470: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 470. (A.R. No. 439 of 1904). VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On another pillar within the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
This begins with the praśasti commencing with “Tirumagaḷ pōla” etc.

This records the gift of 10 vēli of land by purchase from the sabhā of [Ku]dikaichaturvēdimaṅgalam alias Iṟaiyāṉmaṅgalam for 20 kāśu by Viḻiyūr-uḍaiyāṉ Āchchaṉ Pirammādamallan, a merchant of periyavaṅgāḍi (big bazaar) at Tañjāvūr for performing the pīṭhu pūjā and other rituals to the deity Tirumaṟaikkāḍ-uḍaiyār for the merit of Tāyaṉ Āchchaṉ, Āchchaṉ Tāyaṉ, his own elder brother and his younger brothers.

The members of the sabhā of Iṟaiyāṉmaṅgalam made the 10 vēli of land free of taxes like iṟai, echchōṟu, veṭṭivediṉai and others collected by the king, in lieu of 10 kāśu, the remainder being the cost of land.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumakaḷ polap perunila
ccelviyun taṉakke Urimai
pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kānta
ḷūrc cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi
veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyun ta
ṭikapāṭiyun
nuḷampapāṭi
yuṅ kuṭama
laināṭuṅ
kollamuṅ
kaliṅkamu
meṇṭicai
nikaḻa Īḻama
ṇṭalamum I
raṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai
Ilakkamun
tiṇṭiṟal
veṉṟit ta
ṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉe
ḻil vaḷaruḻiyu
ḷallāyāṇṭun
toḻutaka viḷaṅku
m yāṇṭe ceḻi
yaraittecukoḷ śrīkorāca
kecarivaṟmarāṉa śrīrācarācate
vaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 Āvatu ta
ñcāvū ruḷḷālaip periyaṅ
kāṭi vyāpāri viḻiyūruṭaiyā
ṉ Āccaṉ pirammātayalla
ṉ tāyaṉāccaṉukkun tamaiya
ṉ Āccaṉ tāyaṉukkun tampi
mārtThe construction here is faulty. Better read tampimārkkumtirumaṟaikkāṭuṭai[ ya mahā] devaṟ
ku pīṭhapūjai ceyvataṟku nivantam cey
ya vaitta kācu Irupatu Ikkācil vilai dravyam [ 10 I]
kkācu pattum Iṟai kaḻippataṟku kācu pattum Ikkācu I
rupatum I devar caṇṭeśvarapperumāṉiṭaikkoṇṭu
Innāṭṭu brahmadeyam kutikai saturvvetimaṅkalamā
ṉa Iṟaiyāṉmaṅkalattu sabhaiyom viṟṟukkuṭu
tta nilam Itta velikku kiḻpāṟkellai kā
vaṟkāṇi U n=taṉ cakrapāṇi kaṅkaṉ pakkal koṇṭuṭaiya nilattu
kku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai karai vāykkālukku vaṭakku vaṭapāṟkellai vātūḷi
cantira ṉārurāṉ kiḷaṟtalai kaṇi nāṉmāvukkut teṟkum Ivvicainta perunāṉkellai
yilu makappaṭṭa nilam veli 10 mikutikkuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka viṟṟu Innilattāl
vanta Iṟaiyum Eccoṟum veṭṭivetiṉaiyum maṟṟum koṟṟa vācali
ṟ ponta kuṭimai Ellām nāṅkaḷe Iṟuppatāka Iccaṇṭeśvarap peru
māḷukku viṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṟaiyāṉmaṅkalattu sabhaiyom
Iṉnilaṅkoṇṭu cantirātittaval nicatamum Iravu sandhiyil Oṭ
kkaṭṭuva ca ṅkaḷāṟ camaitta palakai koṇṭu pīṭhapūjai
ceyyak kaṭavomāṉom tirumaṟaikkāṭṭu śrī koyiluṭaiyom
Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai Innilattukku melellaiyum cantira
cekaraṉārurāṟ nilattukku kiḻakkuThe record stops here.
Digital edition of SII 17.470 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
